objectives.name: Craft a Copper Pickaxe via Overgeared

title: Overgeared: Copper Age
description:
You've got your stone tools — good. Now it's time for an upgrade.

Mine some §lcopper ore§r and smelt it into ingots. Then use the Overgeared system again (clay molds → cast → forge) to create a §lcopper pickaxe§r.

Why copper? Because your stone pickaxe can't break iron ore — §lcopper is the minimum harvest level for iron§r in this pack.

This is the start of the §lCopper Age§r. You'll be spending a while here, building up infrastructure before you can reach iron. Use this time wisely!

Tip: Overgeared quality matters. Try to craft a Well or Expert quality tool for better mining speed and durability.
